author_bios.details: No author bios on blog posts or guides
author_bios.required: Every content piece needs author with credentials, photo, bio
author_bios.action: Create author profiles with expertise, experience, photo, LinkedIn

company_info.details: About page exists but lacks leadership, history, mission
company_info.required: Full company page with founders, team, mission, milestones, values
company_info.action: Build comprehensive About page with team photos, bios, company timeline

editorial_policy.details: No published editorial guidelines or fact-checking process
editorial_policy.required: Public editorial policy with fact-checking, corrections, transparency
editorial_policy.action: Create editorial-policy.md with process, standards, correction policy

contact_transparency.details: Contact page with form, phone, email, address present
contact_transparency.required: Multiple contact methods, physical address, response time commitment
contact_transparency.action: Add response time SLA, multiple contact channels, office hours

trust_signals.details: Some testimonials, no trust badges, no security certifications displayed
trust_signals.required: SSL badge, payment security, Google reviews widget, certifications
trust_signals.action: Add SSL badge, Razorpay/Stripe badges, Google reviews widget, ISO if applicable

credentials.required: Industry certifications, partner logos, awards, media mentions
credentials.action: Create credentials section with partner logos, certifications, press mentions

reviews_testimonials.details: Some Google reviews, no structured markup, no on-site testimonials
reviews_testimonials.required: Review/AggregateRating schema, testimonial carousel, video testimonials
reviews_testimonials.action: Implement Review/AggregateRating schema, add testimonial widget

security_badges.details: HTTPS enabled, valid SSL certificate, HSTS enabled
security_badges.required: SSL badge, payment security badges, privacy policy, terms of service
security_badges.action: Add SSL trust seal, payment gateway badges, link to privacy/terms
